qa_pair.question: Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx. What is its aspect ratio, in W:H form?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx. What is the title of its last slide?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx and extract its design system as a derived template. How many slide layouts does the derived template contain?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx, extract its design system as a template, and inspect it. Which layout (by name) contains a picture placeholder?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx and extract its theme. What is the major (heading) font of the theme font scheme?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx and extract its theme. What is the hex value of theme accent color 1 (accent1), including the leading #?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx. Searching all slide text and speaker notes, on which slide number does the phrase "audit trail" appear?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx and inspect slide 2. How many bullet paragraphs does its body placeholder contain?

Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx, extract its design system as a template, and validate the deck's compliance against it. Exactly one finding of rule C02 (non-theme font) exists. Which font name does it report?
Open the deck at evals/fixtures/eval_deck.pptx, extract its design system as a template, and validate compliance against it. On which slide number is the C02 (non-theme font) violation?
